---
title: "Contact"
---

**Michelle Hauer**

Postdoctoral Scholar

University of Washington - School of Marine and Environmental Affairs & and the National Oceanic & Atmospheric Administration's (NOAA) Northwest Fisheries Science Center, in support of the Genetics and Evolution Program within the Conservation Biology Division. 


# Contact

<div class="contact-links">

<i class="bi bi-envelope-fill"></i> <a href="mailto:michelle.hauer@noaa.gov">michelle.hauer@noaa.gov</a>

<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=AC6482MAAAAJ&sortby=pubdate&view_op=list_works">Google Scholar</a>

<i class="bi bi-github"></i> <a href="https://github.com/michellehauer">GitHub-Personal</a>

<i class="bi bi-github"></i> <a href="https://github.com/michellehauer-NOAA">GitHub-NOAA</a>

<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/michelle-hauer-172439151/">LinkedIn</a>

<i class="bi bi-twitter-x"></i> <a href="https://x.com/minna_natura">X</a>

<link rel="stylesheet"
href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.7.2/css/all.min.css">

<div class="contact-item">
  <i class="fa-brands fa-bluesky"></i>
  <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/yourhandle.bsky.social">Bluesky</a>
</div> <i class="bi bi-bluesky"></i>

</div>
